criteria.name: seeded_board_walkthrough
criteria.description: On load, the board shows exactly four columns named Backlog, In Progress, Review, and Done, each header showing a live card count, with at least 12 seeded cards total distributed so no column is empty (at least 4 Backlog, exactly 3 In Progress, exactly 3 Review, at least 2 Done), and In Progress and Review each show a WIP limit of 3

criteria.name: card_anatomy_complete
criteria.description: Every seeded card shows a title, a status chip naming its execution state, and an n of m progress indicator for its task items; cards with an assignee show an avatar or initials, and at least 3 seeded cards show a prompt chip with icon and prompt title

criteria.name: drag_between_columns_updates_counts
criteria.description: Using a real pointer drag, moving a card from one column to another places it in the destination column and both column header counts update immediately (source down by one, destination up by one) without a page reload

criteria.name: drop_position_exact
criteria.description: Scripted probe: drag a card and drop it between the first and second cards of another column; the card lands at exactly that index (position 2), not at the top or bottom. Then drag a card within its own column to a new position and confirm it lands at exactly the drop position

criteria.name: keyboard_move_control_parity
criteria.description: Each card exposes a move control (overflow menu or equivalent) offering moves to each of the four columns plus Move up and Move down, operable with the keyboard alone; using it moves the card and updates both column counts exactly as a drag would

criteria.name: create_card_valid_submit
criteria.description: Clicking Add Card in a column opens a modal with title (required, 1 to 120 characters after trim), description (optional, up to 2000), attached prompt select, and assignee select; submitting with a valid title closes the modal, inserts the new card at the top of that column, increments that column count by exactly one, and the board JSON export preview includes the new card under the same field names

criteria.name: create_card_invalid_blocked
criteria.description: In the Add Card modal, Submit stays disabled while the title is empty after trim; submitting with an empty, whitespace-only, or over-120-character title shows an inline validation message naming the title field and adds no card; rapidly double-activating Submit with a valid title creates exactly one card

criteria.name: prompt_panel_readonly
criteria.description: Clicking a card's prompt chip opens a side panel showing the prompt title and full prompt text in read-only form; the panel closes via its close control and via the Escape key

criteria.name: card_detail_edit_saves_in_place
criteria.description: Clicking a card opens a detail modal showing title, description, attached prompt, assignee, a comment thread area, the task item checklist, and a status badge matching the card's current column; editing the title and clicking Save updates the card on the board in place without a reload, while Cancel leaves it unchanged; submitting a comment appends it to the thread with a visible timestamp

criteria.name: filter_search_narrow_all_columns
criteria.description: Selecting an assignee in the toolbar filter narrows all four columns simultaneously to that assignee's cards while the four-column structure remains, and column counts change to reflect visible cards; typing in the search input narrows cards incrementally by title, a visible Clear filters control restores the full board, and clearing the search restores the full board exactly

criteria.name: run_progresses_subitems_sequentially
criteria.description: Pressing Run on a card starts a watchable simulated execution: sub-items advance one at a time in order through pending, running, and complete states, the card's status chip reads running with an active indicator during the run, the n of m progress indicator increments live, and on completion the chip reads complete with m of m shown

criteria.name: retry_backoff_visible
criteria.description: Running the seeded failing card shows a sub-item entering a retrying state with a visible attempt counter and a live backoff countdown of the form 'waiting Ns before retry 2 of 3' before the next attempt starts

criteria.name: manual_retry_resumes_from_failed_step
criteria.description: After a run reaches a failed state, a Retry control appears; activating it resumes execution from exactly the failed sub-item — sub-items already complete keep their checked state and visibly do not re-run from the start

criteria.name: empty_column_state_with_add
criteria.description: Moving or filtering the last card out of a column leaves that column showing an empty state message with an Add Card control that opens the create flow targeting that column

criteria.name: wip_limit_breach_visible
criteria.description: Moving or creating a card into In Progress or Review so the visible count exceeds the WIP limit of 3 shifts that column to a deep amber warning background with a visible breach label beside the count; moving cards out until the count is 3 or fewer clears the amber state and breach label

criteria.name: bulk_move_updates_counts_and_export
criteria.description: Selecting two or more cards reveals a bulk action bar; confirming Move to Done relocates every selected card to Done in selection order, updates all four column counts immediately, clears the selection, dismisses the bar, and the board JSON export lists those cards under done

criteria.name: undo_redo_restores_board_and_export
criteria.description: After a create, move, or bulk move, Undo restores the prior column membership, counts, WIP breach state, and export preview; Redo reapplies the same change; Undo and Redo are disabled when their stacks are empty and respond to Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Shift+Z (Cmd on macOS)

criteria.name: board_json_export_api_shaped
criteria.description: Opening Export shows a live monospaced preview with board JSON and markdown digest tabs; the JSON is API-shaped with a board object, columns (id one of backlog/in-progress/review/done, name, wip_limit, ordered card_ids), cards (id, title, description, column, position, assignee, attached_prompt, status one of pending/running/retrying/failed/complete, tasks with id/title/status/attempts, comments with id/body/created_at ISO-8601), plus prompts and assignees arrays — these field names and enums are visible in the preview text

criteria.name: export_recompiles_from_session_mutations
criteria.description: After creating a card, moving a card, completing a run, or undoing, the Export preview updates without a reload so the compiled board JSON and markdown digest reflect the session mutations currently visible on the board

criteria.name: copy_and_download_export
criteria.description: Copy writes the exact visible export preview text to the clipboard and shows a brief confirmation; Download starts a file download of that same preview text

criteria.name: import_round_trip_board_json
criteria.description: After mutating the board, importing a previously exported board JSON restores the imported cards titles, columns, order, and task progress to match the pre-export mutated state, and the export preview matches again

criteria.name: seeded_libraries_populate_selects
criteria.description: The Add Card modal's attached prompt select lists at least 5 seeded prompts and its assignee select lists at least 4 distinct seeded assignees, matching the seeded libraries

criteria.name: undo_covers_comment_and_import
criteria.description: Undo also reverses a comment submit (the comment disappears from the thread and any comment count restores) and a successful board import (the board returns to its pre-import cards, order, and counts); Redo reapplies each with the same completeness

criteria.name: empty_column_state_designed
criteria.description: When a column has zero visible cards (after move or filter), it shows a designed empty message rather than a bare gap, and still offers Add Card for that column

criteria.name: create_and_import_validate_inline
criteria.description: Add Card and board import show inline validation naming the offending field before any board mutation; whitespace-only titles and titles over 120 characters are rejected

criteria.name: validation_errors_name_fields
criteria.description: Create and import errors name the field and the problem (for example title or import) rather than only saying Invalid

criteria.name: copy_export_and_save_confirm
criteria.description: Copy export shows a brief confirmation, and successful create/save/import show visible feedback (toast or equivalent)

criteria.name: run_shows_progressive_status
criteria.description: While a card is running, sub-items visibly progress through pending/running/complete (or retrying) rather than jumping straight to a final state with no intermediate UI

criteria.name: undo_after_move_or_import
criteria.description: After a card move or successful import, Undo restores the prior board; a failed import is not treated as an undoable success

criteria.name: drop_back_to_origin_noop
criteria.description: Dragging a card and dropping it back in its original position leaves the board and all counts unchanged

criteria.name: long_title_truncates_on_card
criteria.description: A card title longer than 80 characters is truncated with an ellipsis on the board card and shown in full in the detail view and export preview

criteria.name: run_disabled_while_running
criteria.description: The Run control on a card that is already running is disabled or absent until the run finishes or fails

criteria.name: wip_breach_and_bulk_empty
criteria.description: Filling In Progress past WIP limit 3 shows amber breach immediately; bulk move with zero selected cards does nothing and the bulk bar stays hidden

criteria.name: redo_stack_cleared_by_new_action
criteria.description: After an Undo, performing a new mutating action (for example a create) disables Redo and the cleared redo stack cannot resurrect the undone change

criteria.name: column_tiles_match_spec
criteria.description: Columns render as fixed-width tiles in a horizontal board scroller with internally scrollable card lists, matching the visual_design layout contract

criteria.name: typography_hierarchy_matches_spec
criteria.description: Board title is larger than column headers, which are larger than card titles, which are larger than metadata text

criteria.name: accent_borders_match_columns
criteria.description: Card left accent borders match the column color coding — gray Backlog, blue In Progress, yellow Review, green Done — and update when a card moves

criteria.name: specified_motions_present
criteria.description: Drop settle (~200ms), create fade-in (~150ms), modal enter/exit, and status chip color transitions are present for the state changes the instruction calls out

criteria.name: responsive_board_matches_spec
criteria.description: At 768px and 375px the toolbar stacking and board-internal horizontal scroll behave as specified in responsiveness

criteria.name: controls_match_carbon_chrome
criteria.description: Buttons, selects, tags, and modals show designed Carbon-style chrome rather than bare browser defaults

criteria.name: count_and_wip_badges_styled
criteria.description: Column count badges and WIP/breach labels read as compact designed tags adjacent to column names

criteria.name: component_states_match_spec
criteria.description: Buttons and inputs show distinct default, hover, focus ring, disabled, and error treatments as specified

criteria.name: export_drawer_matches_spec
criteria.description: Export drawer shows format tabs, monospaced preview, and Copy/Download/Import actions as a coherent designed surface

criteria.name: drag_ghost_matches_spec
criteria.description: During drag, raised shadow and ghost placeholder match the specified insertion affordance

criteria.name: polished_drag_microinteractions
criteria.description: Card drag/drop or keyboard move includes polish beyond bare relocation — for example coordinated settle of neighbors and a clear insertion ghost that feels intentional

criteria.name: execution_timeline_clarity
criteria.description: Card execution presents a clear, watchable progression (status chip, per-item states, progress n of m) that reads as a designed run timeline rather than a bare checkbox flip

criteria.name: wip_breach_affordance
criteria.description: WIP breach uses a distinctive amber treatment and breach label that makes capacity problems obvious at a glance

criteria.name: export_as_centerpiece
criteria.description: The Export drawer feels like a first-class product surface — live preview, format tabs, copy confirmation — not a hidden dump

criteria.name: bulk_bar_ergonomics
criteria.description: Multi-select and the bulk action bar make batch moves feel intentional and low-friction

criteria.name: undo_confidence
criteria.description: Undo/redo affordances make destructive board edits feel safe and reversible

criteria.name: prompt_panel_readability
criteria.description: The prompt side panel presents full prompt text in a readable, focused reading surface

criteria.name: status_chip_craft
criteria.description: Status chips and progress indicators are visually refined and consistent across card and detail views

criteria.name: empty_state_craft
criteria.description: Empty column and empty filter states are designed, helpful, and on-brand rather than blank gaps

criteria.name: keyboard_parity_delight
criteria.description: Keyboard move controls feel as capable as drag, making the board fully operable without a pointer

criteria.name: innovation_catchall
criteria.description: The app demonstrates a noteworthy, browser-observable enhancement beyond the spec that is NOT covered by any other criterion in this file. The enhancement must plausibly matter to a real user, not be a nitpick. If present, name the enhancement and cite the concrete evidence (element, page state, screenshot) that demonstrates it. If the enhancement is already covered — even partially — by another criterion in this file, answer no here and let that criterion carry it.
criteria.reasoning: yes — observed correct behavior. Evidence: innovation.catchall.png

criteria.name: headers_consistent_capitalization
criteria.description: Where the app renders column headers and toolbar titles (Backlog, In Progress, Export, Undo, Redo), they use one consistent capitalization convention throughout

criteria.name: actions_use_specific_verbs
criteria.description: Where the app renders actions, labels are specific verbs such as Add Card, Run, Retry, Export, and Move to Done rather than generic Submit or OK when a specific label is possible

criteria.name: errors_name_field_and_problem
criteria.description: Where the app renders create or import errors, they name the field and the problem (for example title or import) rather than only Invalid

criteria.name: empty_states_explain_next_step
criteria.description: Where the app renders empty column or empty filter states, the copy explains what belongs there and how to add a card or clear filters

criteria.name: board_copy_well_written
criteria.description: Where the app renders board chrome and status copy, it is free of obvious spelling and grammatical errors

criteria.name: card_terminology_consistent
criteria.description: Where the app refers to cards, columns, and prompts across the board, detail modal, and export, terminology stays consistent

criteria.name: progress_and_counts_consistent
criteria.description: Where the app renders n of m progress and column counts, formatting is consistent across cards and headers

criteria.name: success_messages_specific
criteria.description: Where the app renders create, save, copy, or import confirmations, they state what happened rather than a vague OK

criteria.name: create_then_move_updates_counts_and_export
criteria.description: Submitting Add Card with a valid title in Backlog adds exactly one card at the top of Backlog and increases its count by one; dragging that card into In Progress moves it there, decreases Backlog by one, increases In Progress by one, and the board JSON export lists the card under in-progress with the submitted title — all without a reload

criteria.name: invalid_create_names_title_field
criteria.description: Submitting Add Card with an empty or whitespace-only title shows an inline validation message naming the title field, adds no card, and leaves every column count unchanged

criteria.name: detail_edit_echoes_board_and_export
criteria.description: Editing a card title in the detail view and saving updates the board card in place and the same title appears in the board JSON export preview without a reload; Cancel leaves both unchanged

criteria.name: bulk_move_then_undo_restores_board
criteria.description: Selecting three cards, bulk-moving them to Done, raises Done count by three and lists them under done in the export preview; Undo restores their prior columns, counts, and export preview

criteria.name: export_drawer_and_prompt_panel_switch
criteria.description: Opening Export shows the export drawer with format tabs while the board remains in its current filtered or unfiltered state; closing Export and opening a prompt panel shows the prompt text; returning to the board retains card positions and counts

criteria.name: empty_column_offers_add_card
criteria.description: Moving the last card out of a column leaves a designed empty state with a message and an Add Card control that opens create targeting that column

criteria.name: filter_round_trip_restores_counts
criteria.description: Selecting an assignee in the filter narrows every column to that assignee cards and updates every column count; clearing the filter restores the exact prior board and counts

criteria.name: prompt_panel_closes_with_continuity
criteria.description: Opening a prompt side panel from a card chip shows the prompt title and full text; closing via the close control or Escape returns focus and leaves the board counts and card positions unchanged

criteria.name: create_and_detail_modals_support_flows
criteria.description: Create and detail modals open from Add Card and card clicks, support save/cancel/escape, and do not leave the board unusable after close

criteria.name: failed_run_retry_without_reload
criteria.description: On the seeded failing card, after the run reaches failed, pressing Retry resumes from the failed sub-item without a page reload; previously completed sub-items stay checked

criteria.name: export_import_round_trip_flow
criteria.description: After creating or moving at least one card, Copy or Download the board JSON, then Import that same JSON — visible titles, columns, order, and task progress match the pre-export mutated state and the export preview matches again

criteria.name: board_controls_keyboard_accessible
criteria.description: Cards, selection checkboxes, move controls, Add Card, toolbar filter/search, undo/redo, Export, bulk move actions, modal fields, and Run/Retry are reachable and operable with the keyboard alone (Tab, Shift+Tab, Enter/Space) with a visible focus indicator

criteria.name: modals_and_export_manage_focus
criteria.description: Create/detail modals and the Export drawer use dialog semantics, trap focus while open, close on Escape, and return focus to the control that opened them

criteria.name: icons_have_accessible_names
criteria.description: Prompt, run, retry, move, and toolbar icons expose accessible names (aria-label or equivalent) rather than being unnamed decorative controls that convey meaning

criteria.name: live_regions_for_status_and_errors
criteria.description: Validation errors, execution state changes (running/retrying/failed/complete), WIP breach announcements, and export copy confirmations are conveyed visually and via an aria-live region

criteria.name: form_fields_have_labels
criteria.description: Add Card, detail edit, comment, and import fields use visible labels associated with their inputs

criteria.name: headings_follow_logical_order
criteria.description: Board title and column headers follow a logical heading order with no skipped levels

criteria.name: landmarks_present
criteria.description: The board chrome exposes landmark regions (for example main and navigation/toolbar) so assistive tech can skip to the board

criteria.name: text_and_chips_have_contrast
criteria.description: Column headers, card titles, status chip text, WIP breach labels, and toolbar controls have sufficient contrast against their backgrounds

criteria.name: semantic_roles_for_controls
criteria.description: Interactive board controls use button/checkbox semantics (native or ARIA) rather than clickable bare divs without roles

criteria.name: reduced_motion_respected
criteria.description: With prefers-reduced-motion set, card settle, modal, and check animations apply instantly while state changes and countdown text still occur

criteria.name: cold_start_under_two_seconds
criteria.description: The app is interactive within 2 seconds of a local cold load

criteria.name: interactions_remain_responsive
criteria.description: Dragging cards, toggling filters, bulk moving, and opening Export stay responsive with no multi-second UI freezes

criteria.name: no_jank_during_drag
criteria.description: Card drag and drop stays smooth with no visible jank while the ghost placeholder tracks the insertion position

criteria.name: export_compile_does_not_freeze
criteria.description: Opening Export and switching JSON/markdown tabs recompiles the preview without freezing the UI for multiple seconds

criteria.name: run_progression_stays_smooth
criteria.description: During a card run, sub-item status updates and progress n of m increment without locking the rest of the board

criteria.name: rapid_filter_stable
criteria.description: Rapid filter and search toggling does not hang the page or leave column counts permanently wrong

criteria.name: console_clean_on_load
criteria.description: No console errors or warnings appear on initial load before interaction

criteria.name: console_clean_during_exercise
criteria.description: No console errors or unhandled rejections appear during drags, runs, filtering, export, and bulk moves

criteria.name: board_usable_during_run
criteria.description: While one card is running, the user can still scroll columns and interact with other cards without the UI locking

criteria.name: large_column_scroll_smooth
criteria.description: A column with many cards scrolls inside itself smoothly without hitching the whole page

criteria.name: columns_fixed_width_scrollable
criteria.description: The board renders as a horizontal scrolling container of fixed-width column tiles, and a column with many cards scrolls inside itself rather than stretching the page

criteria.name: column_accent_colors
criteria.description: Cards carry a left accent border color-coded by column — gray for Backlog, blue for In Progress, yellow for Review, green for Done — and moving a card updates its accent to the destination column color

criteria.name: status_chip_palette_consistent
criteria.description: Execution status chips use one consistent palette everywhere: pending neutral gray, running blue with an active indicator, retrying amber, failed red, complete green; each chip label names the state in text

criteria.name: drag_ghost_and_shadow
criteria.description: During a real pointer drag, the dragged card raises with a visible shadow and a ghost placeholder indicates the exact insertion position in the target column

criteria.name: consistent_icons_and_typography
criteria.description: One consistent icon set is used across prompt chips, move menus, run/retry controls, and the toolbar, and typography keeps board title > column headers > card titles > metadata

criteria.name: component_states_styled
criteria.description: Buttons, selects, and inputs show distinct default, hover, focus (visible ring), disabled, and error treatments, with no bare browser-default controls

criteria.name: responsive_no_overflow
criteria.description: At 375 pixels wide no content clips or overflows the viewport and no page-level horizontal scrollbar appears (board-internal column scroll is allowed)

criteria.name: export_and_wip_chrome_designed
criteria.description: Export drawer shows format tabs, monospaced preview, and Copy/Download/Import; WIP limit and breach labels sit beside In Progress and Review counts; undo/redo sit in the toolbar; bulk action bar is a compact tray when selection is active

criteria.name: cold_load_interactive
criteria.description: The app serves via its documented start path and is interactive within 2 seconds of a local cold load

criteria.name: console_clean_full_exercise
criteria.description: No console errors, warnings, or unhandled promise rejections appear on load or during a full exercise of the board: drags, keyboard moves, create/edit, runs with retries, filtering, bulk moves, undo/redo, and export/import

criteria.name: state_coherence_across_surfaces
criteria.description: A change made in one surface reflects everywhere immediately without reload: moving a card updates both column counts and the export preview; editing in the detail modal updates the board card and export; a completed run updates the card chip, progress indicator, and export status fields

criteria.name: reload_returns_seeded_baseline
criteria.description: A page reload after creating, moving, running, selecting, and opening Export returns the app to its seeded baseline (in-memory state only): seeded cards/columns, no filters, empty undo/redo, no selection, Export closed — with no partial mixture of old and new state

criteria.name: keyboard_and_dialog_semantics
criteria.description: Modal dialogs and the Export drawer expose role dialog with aria-modal true, trap focus while open, close on Escape, and return focus to their opener; validation messages are associated with their fields and execution/WIP state changes are announced via an aria-live region

criteria.name: rapid_input_stability
criteria.description: The UI stays responsive and consistent under rapid repeated input — rapid drags, rapid filter toggling, bulk moves, and starting a run while filtering — with no hangs, dropped interactions, or desynced counts

criteria.name: export_field_contract_visible
criteria.description: The board JSON export preview visibly includes the declared API-shaped field names and enums (column ids, status values, tasks.attempts, comments.created_at) matching the instruction field contract

criteria.name: form_rejects_overlong_title
criteria.description: Submitting Add Card with a title longer than 120 characters shows an inline validation message naming title and does not add a card

criteria.name: board_adapts_desktop_to_mobile
criteria.description: At desktop widths all four columns are reachable via the horizontal board scroller; at 375px the toolbar stacks and columns remain fixed-width and horizontally scrollable inside the board without page-level horizontal scroll

criteria.name: mobile_tap_targets_large_enough
criteria.description: At 375px, Add Card, Run/Retry, undo/redo, Export, filter/search, and bulk move controls are large enough to tap without precise aiming

criteria.name: typography_readable_at_breakpoints
criteria.description: Column headers and card titles remain readable at 1440px and 375px without becoming microscopic

criteria.name: no_clip_or_overflow_at_375
criteria.description: At 375px no card, toolbar, Export drawer, or bulk bar content clips or overflows the viewport

criteria.name: toolbar_stacks_on_narrow
criteria.description: At 768px and below the toolbar stacks filter, search, undo/redo, Export, and actions without clipping

criteria.name: columns_remain_reachable
criteria.description: At narrow widths the four columns remain reachable by horizontal scrolling inside the board container; the page itself does not scroll horizontally

criteria.name: touch_drag_and_tap_work
criteria.description: On a narrow viewport, tap targets for Add Card and card open work, and card drag still relocates a card when pointer drag is available

criteria.name: no_page_horizontal_scroll
criteria.description: At 375px no page-level horizontal scrollbar appears (board-internal column scroll is allowed)

criteria.name: export_drawer_fits_narrow
criteria.description: The Export drawer preview, format tabs, and Copy/Download/Import remain usable at 375px without covering primary actions permanently

criteria.name: bulk_bar_reachable_on_mobile
criteria.description: When cards are selected at 375px, the bulk action bar remains reachable and operable

criteria.name: hover_feedback_required
criteria.description: Hovering with the real pointer (verify computed styles while hovering): buttons ease background and shadow with a slight press effect; cards lift subtly; toolbar controls and menu rows take a visible hover wash; form controls show focus rings

criteria.name: drop_settle_transition
criteria.description: After a real pointer drag, the dropped card settles into its new position with a transition of roughly 200 milliseconds rather than snapping, and surrounding cards in both columns animate to their new positions

criteria.name: keyboard_move_animates
criteria.description: Moving a card via its keyboard move control (not a drag and not a WebMCP shortcut) animates the card to its destination with the same settle motion as a drag

criteria.name: create_card_animates_in
criteria.description: Submitting the Add Card form makes the new card animate in from opacity 0 over roughly 150 milliseconds at the top of its column

criteria.name: modal_panel_and_export_transitions
criteria.description: Create and detail modals enter and exit with a short opacity/scale transition of roughly 200 to 300 milliseconds; the prompt side panel slides in/out; the Export drawer and bulk action bar enter and exit with a short opacity transition of roughly 150 to 250 milliseconds

criteria.name: subitem_tick_animation
criteria.description: During a real Run triggered from the card Run control, each sub-item completion animates its check state rather than flipping instantly, and the card progress indicator animates its increment

criteria.name: toasts_slide_and_dismiss
criteria.description: Feedback toasts after create, save, failed runs, copy export, and successful import slide in, remain readable, and auto-dismiss with a fade

criteria.name: reduced_motion_respected
criteria.description: With prefers-reduced-motion set, card movements, modal transitions, and check animations apply instantly while all state changes and countdown text still occur

criteria.name: wip_breach_fades_in
criteria.description: When a column crosses its WIP limit via a real move or create, the amber breach background fades in rather than hard-swapping

criteria.name: status_chip_color_transitions
criteria.description: Status chip changes (pending to running, running to complete, retrying to failed) transition their color rather than hard-swapping, observed during a real Run

criteria.name: backoff_countdown_ticks
criteria.description: On the seeded failing card during a real Run, the retry backoff countdown visibly ticks down once per second until the next attempt starts

criteria.name: reload_resets_in_memory_facets
criteria.description: After creating a card, applying an assignee filter, opening Export, and selecting cards, a page reload returns every facet to the seeded baseline together — seeded cards and columns, no filters, empty undo/redo, no selection, Export closed — never a mix of old and new state

criteria.name: keyboard_reorder_proves_live_order
criteria.description: Using Move down then Move up on a card in a column with at least three cards reverses the relative order correctly both ways, proving order is live board state rather than two hardcoded lists

criteria.name: export_tracks_board_mutations
criteria.description: Create a card with a unique title, move it to Review, then open Export: the board JSON preview contains that title under review; Undo once and the preview no longer places it under review — the export is derived from live store state

criteria.name: detail_board_export_echo
criteria.description: Editing a card title in the detail modal and saving updates the board card title and the same title string in the board JSON export preview without a reload

criteria.name: column_count_delta_exact
criteria.description: Measure a column header count immediately before and after dragging one card into that column; the destination count increases by exactly one and the source decreases by exactly one with no lag

criteria.name: two_creates_differ_in_export
criteria.description: Create two cards with different titles in Backlog; the board shows both distinct titles and the board JSON export contains both distinct title strings

criteria.name: interleaved_create_and_filter
criteria.description: Start Add Card in Backlog, cancel, apply an assignee filter, then create a valid card in In Progress; the new card appears in In Progress when the filter includes its assignee (or after clearing filters), and the prior cancel did not leave a partial card

criteria.name: empty_column_then_repopulate
criteria.description: Move every card out of Review so the empty state shows, then Add Card into Review; the count goes from zero to one and the new card appears with the entered title, and the export preview lists it under review

criteria.name: import_export_full_pipeline
criteria.description: Mutate the board (create or move), Copy the board JSON, reload to seeded baseline, Import that JSON — the board shows the mutated titles/columns/order and the export preview matches the imported state
